problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bioelectrochemical. Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
